scope_note: This panel summarizes the structured course-rigor and application-guidance notes currently exported for this school. It remains source-backed and does not infer missing requirements.

areas.name: Course rigor
areas.summary: Georgetown recommends a full secondary-school program in English, at least two years of social studies, language study, mathematics, and one year of natural science; applicants planning math or science concentrations should take four years of mathematics and at least three years of science.
areas.detail: Georgetown recommends a full secondary-school program in English, at least two years of social studies, language study, mathematics, and one year of natural science; applicants planning math or science concentrations should take four years of mathematics and at least three years of science.

areas.name: Recommendations
areas.summary: A complete first-year application includes a Teacher’s Recommendation.
areas.detail: A complete first-year application includes a Teacher’s Recommendation.
